scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,focus,math,lang,sensory -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan "npm run dev:server -w ausome" "npm run dev -w @ausome/focus-module" "npm run dev -w @ausome/math-module" "npm run dev -w @ausome/language-module" "npm run dev -w @ausome/sensory-module"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @ausome/focus-module && npm run build -w @ausome/math-module && npm run build -w @ausome/language-module && npm run build -w @ausome/sensory-module
